records.raw_text: All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Every detected failure must be logged to an append-only structured failure ledger.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Failure taxonomy changes must be versioned and may not silently rewrite historical labels.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Only validated failures may be promoted into benchmark fixtures.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Benchmark promotion requires human approval before a fixture becomes part of replayable suites.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Regression suites must score outputs across multiple dimensions rather than a single aggregate score alone.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Evaluator prompts, thresholds, and model versions must be frozen for any baseline used in promotion decisions.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: System changes must pass sandbox evaluation before shadow evaluation.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: No change may be promoted to production without benchmark replay against the relevant fixture set.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: AI-generated reflections or rule proposals may never directly modify production rules.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Human approval is mandatory for rule acceptance, benchmark promotion, and override of critical regressions.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Systemic-versus-one-off failure classification must use deterministic clustering or deterministic feature analytics in primary workflows.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Style fingerprints must be versioned and frozen between releases unless changed through governance.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Multi-pass pipelines must preserve strict schema contracts between generation, refinement, and enforcement stages.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Production runtime style enforcement must be rule-based or use frozen numeric thresholds from hybrid evaluators.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Long-form coherence must be backed by structured continuity state rather than raw-context recall alone.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: State transitions must be logged as explicit diffs and may not retroactively rewrite canonical state without governance.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Reflexion-style self-reflection may run only in sandboxed improvement loops, never as a live production writer or updater.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Promotion decisions must reject Pareto-unsafe changes that improve one dimension while dropping another below minimum thresholds.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: External dependency changes, including evaluator or model-version changes, require fresh benchmark replay before promotion.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Write every failure event to `failure_log.jsonl` with fixture id, pipeline stage, version metadata, evaluator outputs, and resolution state.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Maintain `failure_taxonomy.json` as a controlled vocabulary with explicit versioning.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Cluster failure-ledger entries periodically to identify systemic spikes by fixture, genre, style, failure type, and model version.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Convert approved representative failures into versioned benchmark fixtures and record failure-to-fixture lineage.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Run multi-metric regression suites on frozen fixtures before any architecture, prompt, rule, or model change is promoted.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Generate `system_change_proposal` artifacts for every candidate update and route them through sandbox then shadow evaluation.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Freeze evaluator prompts, thresholds, and configs per release so score comparisons remain historically meaningful.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Keep AI-generated rule or prompt proposals in proposal logs only until human approval occurs.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Compute style-conformity scores against frozen style fingerprints and log drift over time.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Cap refinement passes and preserve stage-separated artifacts for generation, refinement, and enforcement outputs.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Load continuity state snapshots before generation or refinement and emit deterministic `state_diff` artifacts after each segment.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Use rule-based checks in production runtime; confine LLM-as-judge and Reflexion-style loops to sandbox analysis unless explicitly frozen and approved.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Failure-ledger noise collapse caused by over-broad taxonomy or noisy evaluators.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Failure-to-fixture bloat caused by uncontrolled promotion and duplicate fixtures.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Benchmark overfitting where the system optimizes to historical fixtures but drifts elsewhere.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Evaluator drift that invalidates baseline comparisons across releases.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Governance capture where proposal and approval paths are not sufficiently separated.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Rubber-stamp governance fatigue that lets regressions through.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: AI-on-AI degradation where evaluator or reflection bias shapes production rules indirectly.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Systemic-failure false positives caused by unstable clustering features or thresholds.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Style fingerprint overconstraint that preserves sameness instead of voice.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Style fingerprint creep caused by retraining on already-homogenized outputs.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Multi-pass oscillation where refinement loops endlessly or degrades original intent.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Production style-flattening caused by overpowered enforcement stages.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Continuity lock-in where incorrect state is preserved and enforced downstream.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: State explosion that makes long-form continuity unmanageable or too costly.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Hybrid-evaluator silent drift where soft components shift behavior without governance.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Stable-but-wrong promotion where deterministic outputs still fail core quality or correctness goals.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Reflection-style tone contamination where sandbox reflections bias prose toward explanatory blandness.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Replay a fixed failure corpus twice and verify the failure ledger produces identical structured entries under frozen configs.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Submit duplicate failure cases to fixture-promotion flow and verify deterministic deduplication prevents benchmark bloat.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Run a candidate update that improves target failures but harms style metrics and confirm governance marks it Pareto-unsafe.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Change evaluator prompts without version bump and verify baseline-comparison checks fail the promotion pipeline.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Inject an AI-generated rule proposal into production-rule paths and verify one-way influence boundaries block it.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Feed clustered one-off failures and true systemic spikes into analytics and verify deterministic clustering distinguishes them.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Run outputs against frozen style fingerprints and confirm style drift is flagged while approved intentional shifts remain allowed only through governance.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Force repeated refinement passes and verify pass caps plus stage-contract checks prevent oscillation loops.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Seed contradictory entity updates into continuity state and verify state-diff and coherence checks block illegal transitions.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Compare rule-based, structured-critic, LLM-judge, and hybrid evaluators on the same fixture set and verify determinism boundaries are reported correctly.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Run Reflexion-style sandbox loops and verify their proposals are logged as data only and cannot update live runtime.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Execute sandbox, shadow, and promotion stages for a system change and verify artifact lineage is complete and promotion criteria are enforced.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

names: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.
